children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Attorney General shall issue guidance to create, carry out, and administer the Program in accordance with this section.

children.heading: Funds to be directed to local control
children.label: b Funds to be directed to local control
children.text: Amounts made available as grants under the Program shall be, to the greatest extent practicable, locally controlled to address problems that are identified locally.

children.heading: Task Forces
children.label: c Task Forces
children.text: Thirty percent of the amounts made available as grants under the Program each fiscal year shall be granted to Gang Task Forces in regions experiencing a significant or increased presence of criminal or transnational organizations engaging in high levels of violent crime, firearms offenses, human trafficking, and drug trafficking.

children.heading: Priority
children.label: d Priority
children.text: Amounts made available as grants under the Program shall be used to prioritize the investigation and prosecution of individuals who have an aggravating or leadership role in a criminal or transnational organization described in subsection (c).
